---
name: Improvement
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing pattern, implementation, or section
labels: improvement
---

## Pattern or File

Which pattern (or file) are you improving?

<!-- e.g., patterns/cost-control/semantic-caching/ -->

## What to Improve

What section or file needs work? Be specific — quote the current content if relevant.

## Proposed Improvement

What would make it better? If you have a draft, include it here.

## Why This Matters

What's the practical impact of the current version vs. the improved version? Is this a production gotcha you've hit, a missing failure mode, an edge case in the implementation?

## Are You Willing to Submit a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit the change myself
- [ ] No, just flagging for the maintainer
